programme.desc: Madame Gazelle and the playgroup are sharing their favourite nursery thymes. From singing Little Bo Peep to marching along with The Grand Old Duke of York, everyone enjoys listening to each other's choice.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Teddy needs mending and cleaning after rolling down hills and jumping in muddy puddles, so Peppa takes her to Miss Rabbit's Doll Hospital.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It's Wendy Wolf's birthday and she has invited Peppa and all her friends to her party! There are bubbles and balloons to play with - and Wendy even teaches them how to howl like a wolf!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig is determined that George's new hat doesn't get muddy when Peppa and George visit Grandpa and Granny Pig. Everyone tries to make sure that it stays clean - even if it means that they get messy instead!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and the gang sail on a canal boat.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George explore the greenhouse, and it is full of lovely tomatoes and basil. When it's time for dinner, Granny Pig takes all the ingredients they have grown and makes a tasty salad.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George go sailing with Grandpa Pig, but when he keeps getting stuck in the mud, they all decide to have a sleepover on the boat while they wait for the tide to come back in.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle sets the children a creative task - making masks. There are carrot masks, robot masks, and even pretty butterfly masks.The only thing missing is lots and lots of glitter!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: There is a new girl at school, and she quickly makes best friends with Peppa and Rebecca Rabbit. Molly shows them how good she is at digging while taking them on a tour of her underground house.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It's Richard Rabbit's birthday party and George is invited. That can only mean one thing - soft play! George and friends have great fun, swinging, bouncing and climbing, but it isn't quite as much fun for the grown-ups!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family take a trip to the market to buy some apples, cheese and fish. However, they get more than they were expecting when they stop by Mr Fox's stall - he is selling some extra special items!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family travel to Paris to visit Delphine and her relatives. The donkeys take Peppa and her family to the top of the Eifel Tower, forcing Dad to face his fear of heights.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are helping Grandpa Pig to dig a new pond for his garden. While digging, they find hidden treasure so they go to see Mr. Richard in the museum.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family go on a walk through the forest where they meet all of their favourite fairytale characters. They visit the home of bears who like porridge and meet a hungry Mr. Wolf.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George's toy basket is full and their beds are covered in toys, so Mummy Pig decides it is time to order a new toy cupboard. The cupboard arrives in the post but it needs to be assembled - and Mummy and Daddy Pig are not very good at DIY. Luckily help is at hand, as Mr Zebra the Postman loves assembling flat pack furniture.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It's time for playgroup, and Peppa and friends are thinking about what they want to be when they grow up. Some in the group want to be nurses, police officers and even pirates, but Peppa takes a little while to figure out what she wants to be.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The doctor teaches children what to do when there is an accident. A patient soon appears and they put into practise the new techniques they have learned.

programme.desc: Tiddles gets stuck in a tree and needs to be rescued. When the turtle falls on Pedro's nose, he needs to go to the doctors to make sure everything is ok.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Rome: Empire Without Limit With Mary Beard
programme.desc: Mary Beard reaches back to the myths and legends of the origins of Rome to gain an insight into the deep-rooted psyche of the people of Rome - a city born through fratricide and rape.

programme.title: Rome: Empire Without Limit With Mary Beard
programme.desc: Mary Beard explores the physical world of the Roman Empire, and finds surprising parallels with our own world. Setting out in the footsteps of the emperor Hadrian, she discovers a vast empire bound together by a common material culture, and a globalised economy of such scale that evidence of its side-effects can still be seen today, thousands of miles away from Rome.

programme.title: Rome: Empire Without Limit With Mary Beard
programme.desc: Mary takes an in-depth look at the question of identity and citizenship within the Roman Empire. What did it mean to be, or to become, Roman, and how did the very different parts of the Empire react to Roman rule? In the beautifully-preserved cities of Algeria, incomers and locals mixed to create flourishing communities with a distinct `more Roman than Rome' frontier identity.

programme.title: Rome: Empire Without Limit With Mary Beard
programme.desc: Mary tackles the biggest puzzle of all: why, and how, did the Roman Empire fall? Surveying the massive walls and fortifications of Britain and Germany, she discovers an empire under pressure, struggling to control its borders. Mary seeks to redefine our understanding of the so-called `Barbarian Invasions', but also shows that the Roman Empire was facing even greater challenges from within.

programme.title: Weathered: Earth's Extremes
programme.desc: A visit to Isle de Jean Charles in Louisiana, one of the first communities in the U.S. to undergo a federally funded relocation due to climate change.

programme.title: Rum & Revolution: History of Havana
programme.desc: In the 1950's, Havana shines as a vibrant metropolis, but is secretly controlled by the American mafia who subject most Cubans to poverty. Fidel Castro and his revolutionaries enter Havana and end US dominance on the island in 1959.

programme.title: Legends and Luxury - History of Marrakesh
programme.desc: Marrakesh, hailed as the most enchanting city in the Maghreb, captivated Western elites with its mystical allure. Famous personalities like Winston Churchill, Yves Saint Laurent and more have contributed to Marrakech's enduring spirit and mythos.

programme.title: Britney Spears - Live from London
programme.desc: Filmed at Roundhouse, London, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Britney Spears performs her hits including Baby One More Time, Oops! I Did It Again, Toxic and many more.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: In 1992, gang activity escalates in Chicago; with local law enforcement unable to curb the growing drug trade, a multi-agency task force headed by Assistant U.S. Attorney Ron Safer focuses on one of the city's most vicious street gangs.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: For many teenagers, their first jobs are at fast-food restaurants. Parents feel that these are safe environments for their children. That image is shattered when seven employees of three different fast-food restaurants in the Nashville, Tennessee area are murdered over a two-month period in 1997. Months of investigation reveal a Texas parolee as the prime suspect.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: A community is horrified when seven trick-or-treaters in Pasadena, California are sprayed with gunfire on Halloween night in 1993, leaving three young boys dead. Investigators rely on forensic clues, eyewitness accounts, and street informants to find the killers, three gang members bent on avenging a friend's death.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: Harold Shipman was a respected doctor but he was killing his older patients. His murder spree has claimed at least 215 lives and the families of the dead wanted him to pay in court.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: When the body of a young girl is found, the paedophile living nearby is the prime suspect. This inspired Sarah's Law, which grants the UK public information on sex offenders.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: Headlines are made for the sexual assault and murder of a British student in Italy. Housemate Amanda Knox and her boyfriend are suspected. Find out if prosecutors can keep them behind bars.

programme.title: Infamous Crime Scenes: OJ
programme.desc: Turn back the clock and uncover the truth behind the OJ Simpson trial.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.sub-title: The Mum Who Murdered Her Kids
programme.desc: In October 1994, Susan Smith reports her children missing. For days, Susan and her husband plead for their return. Eventually the truth emerges: Susan has drowned her children.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In October 1989, two lesbian couples lure a man into their car and take him to a park. They kill him and in a bizarre twist, drink his blood. But they leave behind a critical clue.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In March 2004, Marc Dutroux was accused of keeping girls in cages. Two escape, but four bodies are found.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: After Graeme Cunningham vanished in 1983, police charged Arthur Bishop, who admitted to killing him and four other young boys. When a trial followed, prosecutors pushed for the harshest punishment for the serial killer.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: The death of Peppino Impastato in 1978 was dismissed by police as a random act. But he was an anti-Mafia activist. Were the people behind his death sheltered by the Mafia?

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: Harold Shipman was a respected doctor but he was killing his older patients. His murder spree has claimed at least 215 lives and the families of the dead wanted him to pay in court.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: Exploring and analysing the most famous criminal cases in history, and the punishments the culprits received.

programme.title: Struggle for Justice
programme.desc: In 1988 a pathologist falsely testified that a woman, who had choked on her cereal, had been strangled. Her husband was convicted of her murder. Could he prove his innocence?

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: An evening of pick-up basketball in Houston turns tragic when prosecutor Gil Epstein is murdered in a community center parking lot. Investigators depend on anonymous tips and hazy eyewitness accounts to track down a killer. District Attorney Chuck Rosenthal leads a prosecution team whose chances for a conviction are put in jeopardy by a single holdout juror.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: When the death rate at a rural Indiana hospital skyrockets, an investigation implicates a nurse, Orville Lynn Majors. State Police are left with a daunting task. In order to conclude that Majors is a serial killer, police first have to first figure out if the deaths were murders and then determine how he killed the patients.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: When a mother and her infant daughter disappear from rural Huntsville, Texas, suspicion quickly falls on the woman's husband. Lacking evidence, authorities cannot make an arrest. With the case growing cold, a teenager hundreds of miles away confesses to the murder of Margaret and Kori Rae Owings.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: On Memorial Day Weekend 1996, a woman's body is discovered in a storm drain in Marietta, Ohio. Police eventually identify the woman as college student Sheree Petry and begin to focus the investigation on one suspect, Dennis Rydbom, who had been spurned by the victim.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: When firefighters in suburban Indianapolis are called to a house fire, what they find inside shocks the entire community, a respected minister and his wife have been murdered with an ax. An exhaustive investigation leads authorities to a teenage church member and his accomplice.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: A string of rapes spanning two decades goes unsolved in Jacksonville, Florida, until Detective Diana Clarke finds a link among the crimes and discovers that a serial rapist is terrorizing the community. After a suspect is finally arrested, Detective Clarke teams up with Prosecutor Libby Senterfitt to track down the rapist's victims and convince them to testify.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1997, two students are attacked while walking by railway tracks. One dies, one lives. By 1999, there are eight more similar victims. Find out if the survivor holds the key to the case.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In March 2004, Marc Dutroux was accused of keeping girls in cages. Two escape, but four bodies are found.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: The death of Peppino Impastato in 1978 was dismissed by police as a random act. Because he was an anti-Mafia activist, questions have been raised about the circumstances.

programme.title: Infamous Crimes: JFK
programme.desc: The story of JFK's assasination. He was an American politician who served as the 35th president of the United States from 1961 until his assassination near the end of his third year in office.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: Seemingly normal couple Karla Hornolka and Paul Bernardo murdered two teenage girls together, but would their dedication to one another last through the trial?

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: When the body of a young girl is found, the paedophile living nearby is the prime suspect. This inspired Sarah's Law, which grants the UK public information on sex offenders.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1974 a serial killer emerges in Kansas. He calls himself BTK- Bind, Torture and Kill- his method of murder. The trail of clues ends at Denis Rader, a seemingly normal father.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: Elderly Simon Dale is found murdered in his English mansion. He is near blind and could not repel his attacker. HIs ex-wife is a suspect, but do the courts have enough evidence?

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials

programme.title: The Great Songwriters

programme.title: Discovering Music

programme.title: Discovering Music

programme.title: André Rieu Royale: Coronation Concert Live in Amsterdam

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: When pretty hotel worker Elly is charmed by a guest, archaeologist Max Kelada, it seems that the Mr Know-All professor might not be the man he claims to be.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A flamboyant stranger goads a young man into taking a frightening bet whilst on holiday in Jamaica.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.sub-title: Mrs Bixby and the Colonel's Coat
programme.desc: An unfaithful wife tries to explain away her lover's gift of an expensive mink coat without arousing her husband's suspicions.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A man continues to dominate his wife even after his death by persuading a surgeon to perform a macabre experiment.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: The mysterious murder weapon used to kill a young policeman can't be found.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A girl (Katherine Crawford) gets into the wrong car at an Arizona cafe and witnesses a murder in Mexico.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: After an adopted son drowns, a strange woman (Madlyn Rhue) arrives claiming to be the boy's natural mother.

programme.title: Simon & Garfunkel: Old Friends On Stage
Johnny Cash Live at Montreux
programme.desc: The American country-music legend does an amazing performance at the 1994 Montreux Jazz Festival, featuring 19 of his classic songs and welcoming his wife, June Carter Cash, to the stage.

programme.title: California Dreamin': The Songs of the Mamas and the Papas
programme.desc: Performance clips, home movies and interviews with members of the group show its folk/pop foundations.

programme.title: Agatha Christie: The Pale Horse
programme.desc: A man wants to know why he was on a list of names in the shoe of a dead woman. Three witches are suspected of being responsible for a series of murders.

programme.title: Bee Gees: One Night Only
programme.desc: The Bee Gees perform their greatest hits from the 60s, 70s, 80s and 90s, with guests including Celine Dion. From the MGM in Las Vegas in 1997.

programme.title: Dolly Parton: Song By Song
programme.desc: Country singing sensation Dolly Parton looks back at her song "9 to 5" and tells stories of its creation and meaning.

programme.title: Dolly Parton: Song By Song
programme.desc: Country singing sensation Dolly Parton looks back at her song "Travelin' Thru" and tells stories of its creation and meaning.

programme.title: Opry Live
programme.sub-title: Scotty McCreery, Justin Moore, Sara Evans, Old Crow Medicine Show
programme.desc: Concerts from the Grand Ole Opry for country music fans.

programme.title: Greatest Guitar Riffs
programme.desc: The Black Sabbath guitarist Tony Iommi reveals how he created the riffs that changed the genre of rock forever as Brian May of Queen joins him at his home studio for a jam session.

programme.title: God Bless Ozzy Osbourne
programme.desc: A portrait of rocker Ozzy Osbourne, including his time as lead singer of Black Sabbath, his solo career and his struggles with substance abuse.

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.desc: Motörhead reached the pinnacle of their artistic and commercial success with `Ace of Spades'. Interviews with band members Lemmy, Phil Taylor and Eddie Clarke give a taste of what life was like in the metal band.

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.desc: Motörhead reached the pinnacle of their artistic and commercial success with `Ace of Spades'. Interviews with band members Lemmy, Phil Taylor and Eddie Clarke give a taste of what life was like in the metal band.

programme.title: The Great Songwriters
programme.desc: Original portraits of songwriters discussing the creative process and their inspiration, including exclusive performances and interviews.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Thriller set at the Stanley Cup ice hockey finals. It's Game 7 and the winner will lift the trophy but with the Vice President attending, criminal Joshua Foss has his eyes on a bigger prize. Holding the VP hostage, his demands are backed up by the shooting of selected hostages and the threat of bombs planted around the stadium. However, rink security guard McCord, whose kids are in the crowd, refuses to be cowed.

programme.title: Red Right Hand
programme.desc: Cash is trying to live a quiet, honest life in a small Appalachian town. When a vicious crime boss forces him back into her services, he soon learns he's capable of anything to protect his family and his home.

programme.title: William Tell
programme.desc: In 14th Century Switzerland, a once peaceful hunter leads his people in rebellion after his family and country are threatened by a tyrannical Austrian King. As the Holy Roman Empire crumbles, the quiet lives of the Swiss peasants are upended.

programme.title: Prisoner of War
programme.desc: Captured by Japanese forces during World War II, a British SAS officer and his fellow prisoners are forced to fight in brutal death matches for the entertainment of their captors.

programme.title: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: In a time before the pyramids, an evil king threatens to take over the world, so the leaders of the remaining tribes under threat call upon a desert warrior to help them defeat the wicked one and his brutal hordes. As the warrior battles against the evil around him, he is preparing for a final showdown that will decide if it is to be his destiny to become the great Scorpion King.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: As war with the Transformers rages on, inventor Cade Yeager forms an unlikely alliance with Bumblebee, an English lord and an Oxford professor to save the planet.

programme.title: Batman Returns
programme.desc: After Selina Kyle sees more than she should in her boss's office, she has an `accident', falling from the top floor of the building to the street below. Awoken by the licking of cats, she is surprised to find herself still very much alive. She vows to take revenge on her boss and becomes a female avenger, defending women under attack and providing assistance to Batman's efforts to keep the streets of Gotham safe.

programme.title: Troy
programme.desc: When Trojan prince Paris woos Helen, Queen of Sparta, away from her husband Menelaus, the legendary warrior Achilles is called to lead the armies of Greece against the city fortress of Troy.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Sequel in which the entrepreneur who genetically engineered the dinosaurs in Jurassic Park transpires to have cloned more of the prehistoric monsters on another island location. Researchers arrive to observe the creatures in their natural habitat, but hot on their heels is a band of mercenaries intent on capturing the dinosaurs and transporting them back to San Diego Zoo.

programme.title: Olympus Has Fallen
programme.desc: America's national security team must rely on a disgraced former guard to save the president after terrorists seize control of the White House, taking the chief of state hostage.

programme.title: Long Gone Heroes
programme.desc: Gunner is a special forces soldier who returns to the field of battle to save his kidnapped niece in South America. He and his team soon discover that her disappearance is part of a corrupt private operation that hits way too close to home.

programme.title: Police Story III: Supercop
programme.desc: Hong Kong detective Jackie Chan teams up with his female Red Chinese counterpart to stop a Chinese drug czar.

programme.title: The Toxic Avenger
programme.desc: A janitor becomes a social outcast when a freak accident at a chemical factory turns him into a mutant. However, he soon uses his newfound superhuman strength to battle slimy criminals and a corrupt CEO.

programme.title: The Toxic Avenger
programme.desc: A janitor becomes a social outcast when a freak accident at a chemical factory turns him into a mutant. However, he soon uses his newfound superhuman strength to battle slimy criminals and a corrupt CEO.

programme.title: Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby
programme.desc: A champion NASCAR driver's cosy position alongside his best friend at the top of the championship is threatened by a flamboyant French newcomer. With his confidence shattered, the driver draws on the help of his father and some eccentric training techniques to claw his way back to the top.

programme.title: Zoolander
programme.desc: A disgraced male model becomes the unwitting fall guy in an evil designer's plot to assassinate a world leader.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop from the original film returns to Los Angeles to help solve another case. This time he must direct his efforts towards unraveling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by leather-jacketed punks. The investigation puts him on the trail of an illegal arms dealer and his hit lady.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumberer: When Harry Met Lloyd
programme.desc: A grant-greedy principal puts two clueless teens in a bogus class for students with special needs.

programme.title: Little Fockers
programme.desc: Greg and Pam have been together for ten years, and now they're the proud parents of two adorable twins. However, money is tight and in order to keep his family afloat, devoted nurse Greg takes a second job working for a drug company. That development doesn't sit well with Jack, whose previous suspicions regarding his hapless son-in-law soon come back in full force after learning of this development.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Bridget's brand new relationship with Darcy has taken a plummet due to her jealousy of his workmate. Having previously left the publishing house she worked for to avoid her boss, Daniel, with whom she had an unsuccessful romance, she finds him along for the ride on her new job, which takes her to Thailand, and almost into his arms.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones must figure out which of the two men in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: Axel Foley and his Beverly Hills buddies investigate criminal activities at a Southern California amusement park.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: Zoolander
programme.desc: A disgraced male model becomes the unwitting fall guy in an evil designer's plot to assassinate a world leader.

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: When Annie and Jay first met, they had an instant and intense romantic connection. However, 10 years and two children later, the flames of passion have dimmed to dull embers. To bring the spark back to their relationship, Annie and Jay decide to record themselves trying out every position in "The Joy of Sex." It seems like a great idea -- until they discover that their private recording has gone public via the Internet.

programme.title: Am I OK?
programme.desc: When Lucy realises that she's never been attracted to men, her lifelong friend Jane helps her navigate coming out in her 30s.

programme.title: Am I OK?
programme.desc: When Lucy realises that she's never been attracted to men, her lifelong friend Jane helps her navigate coming out in her 30s.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Horizon: An American Saga: Chapter 1
programme.desc: In 1859 families discover the lure of the Old West as they settle in territories from Wyoming to Kansas. Meanwhile, a gruff cowboy soon finds himself on the run with a prostitute and a young boy after killing a fellow gunman.

programme.title: Cookster: The Darkest Days
programme.desc: A dyslexic teen misunderstood by his family and desperate for respect, becomes a drug dealer struggling with addiction and debt while a rival threatens to destroy his world, driving him apart from the woman he loves.

programme.title: Drift
programme.desc: Young Liberian refugee Jacqueline barely escapes her war-torn country to settle on a Greek island. Her daily struggle for survival keeps terrible memories at bay, and she becomes close to an American tour guide.

programme.title: Night Call
programme.desc: After responding to an emergency call from a mysterious woman, a young locksmith gets unwittingly caught in the crosshairs of a ruthless mob boss.

programme.title: May December
programme.desc: Twenty years after their notorious tabloid romance, a married couple buckle under the pressure when a Hollywood actress meets them to do research for a film about their past.

programme.title: A Mistake
programme.desc: A surgeon allows her young colleague to take charge during a surgery. When a mistake occurs, the surgeon finds herself in a difficult situation.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: Chicago teen Ren and his family move to the small midwestern town of Bomont, where rock music has been banned.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: Parallel coming-of-age stories of a layabout `serial nice guy' living a posh, carefree lifestyle off his deceased father's fortune, and a bright but awkward youth who's tired of his mother's depressed, boyfriend-less state. Their paths collide when the boy fabricates a two-year-old son and joins a group called S.P.A.T. (Single Parents Alone Together).

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Hard-drinking country music star Jackson Maine discovers, and falls in love with, a struggling but talented singer named Ally. As her career quickly takes off, Jackson starts to realize that his best days may be behind him.

programme.title: Skincare
programme.desc: A famed aesthetician faces a new challenge when a rival opens a skin care boutique directly across from her store. Suspecting that someone is trying to sabotage her, she embarks on a quest to unravel the mystery of who's trying to destroy her life.

programme.title: Amadeus
programme.desc: Once the highly regarded composer to the Viennese Court, Salieri is now an old man, unknown and confined to an asylum. After a suicide attempt he recounts his story to a young cleric, going back 30 years to his heyday at the court of Emperor Joseph II, where he first met the young Mozart. Despite Salieri's Machiavellian attempts to frustrate Mozart's progress, the great young composer attracts the favour of the Emperor.

programme.title: North Hollywood
programme.desc: A kid must decide between choosing the future his father wants and following his dream of becoming a pro skater.

programme.title: North Hollywood
programme.desc: A kid must decide between choosing the future his father wants and following his dream of becoming a pro skater.

programme.title: Mouse Hunt
programme.desc: Slapstick tale which follows the misfortunes of two hard-up brothers whose plans to renovate and sell a valuable building are jeopardised by a rogue mouse. The brothers soon find themselves pulling out all the stops in order to evict their tiny resident.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Four unlikely warriors rise from the sewers and join forces with fearless reporter April O'Neil to save New York from Shredder and his evil minions.

programme.title: Pets on a Train
programme.desc: When a crew of animal bandits embark on a routine swindle, they find themselves caught up in a train heist. It's up to Falcon, a petty thief raccoon, and Rex, a righteous police-dog, to save the animals on this high-speed runway train.

programme.title: Happy Feet Two
programme.desc: Mumble's son Erik hasn't yet found his talents, and he goes with his friends to Adélie-land which is ruled by a penguin who can fly. When Erik returns to Emperor-land and finds them trapped under big walls of ice. Will Erik be able to save his family and friends before it is too late?

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: Barry B Benson is an everybee with a dream. He escapes the hive and makes contact with a human, the florist Vanessa Bloome. Enraged to discover that humans have been stealing their honey goodness, Barry sets out on a crusade that will change the ecosystem forever. Will it be for the better? A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie
programme.desc: When Gabby's dollhouse, her most prized possession, ends up in the hands of an eccentric cat lady named Vera, she sets off on an adventure through the real world to get the Gabby Cats back together before it's too late.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie 2: The Second Part
programme.desc: The citizens of Bricksburg face a dangerous new threat when LEGO DUPLO invaders from outer space start to wreck everything in their path. The battle to defeat the enemy and restore harmony to the LEGO universe takes Emmet, Lucy, Batman and the rest of their friends to faraway, unexplored worlds that test their courage and creativity.

programme.title: Babe
programme.desc: Engaging family tale based on Dick King-Smith's classic story about an orphaned piglet which is adopted by a sheepdog and learns how to herd sheep. Babe at first seems destined to end up on the dining table at Christmas, but the farmer realises that the animal's unusual talent may bring him glory in the sheepdog trials.

programme.title: DC League of Super-Pets
programme.desc: Krypto the Super-Dog and Superman are inseparable best friends, now Krypto must convince a ragtag group of animals to master their own newfound powers to help him save Superman and the rest of the Justice League.

programme.title: Charlotte's Web
programme.desc: After learning that a young pig's days are numbered, a literate spider weaves an elaborate plan to save her friend from the butcher's block.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie
programme.desc: When Gabby's dollhouse, her most prized possession, ends up in the hands of an eccentric cat lady named Vera, she sets off on an adventure through the real world to get the Gabby Cats back together before it's too late.

programme.title: Happy Feet
programme.desc: Son of Memphis and Norma, little sweet penguin Mumble has a big problem: he can't sing a single note. In a world where everyone needs a heart song to attract a soul mate, Mumble feels he doesn't belong there. Our hero Mumble is the worst singer in the world, but he can tap dance brilliantly.

programme.title: Happy Feet Two
programme.desc: Mumble's son Erik hasn't yet found his talents, and he goes with his friends to Adélie-land which is ruled by a penguin who can fly. When Erik returns to Emperor-land and finds them trapped under big walls of ice. Will Erik be able to save his family and friends before it is too late?

programme.title: The Emoji Movie
programme.desc: Three emojis embark on an epic adventure through a smartphone to save their world from being deleted.

programme.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Charlie Bucket comes from a poor family, and spends most of his time dreaming about the chocolate that he loves but usually can't afford. Things change when Willy Wonka, head of the very popular Wonka Chocolate empire, announces a contest in which five gold tickets have been hidden in chocolate bars. Charlie is one of the five kids who finds a lucky ticket and goes on a tour of Wonka's chocolate factory.

programme.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Charlie Bucket comes from a poor family, and spends most of his time dreaming about the chocolate that he loves but usually can't afford. Things change when Willy Wonka, head of the very popular Wonka Chocolate empire, announces a contest in which five gold tickets have been hidden in chocolate bars. Charlie is one of the five kids who finds a lucky ticket and goes on a tour of Wonka's chocolate factory.

programme.title: Rumble in the Bronx
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop on holiday in New York puts his martial arts skills to good use when he helps out a friend whose shop is targeted by a vicious street gang. Martial arts hero Jackie Chan, as always, does all his own stunts.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Unmissable Sky Originals
programme.desc: Dive into a world of unmissable Sky Original films, from psychological thriller To Catch a Killer to the Oscar-nominated The Unites States vs Billie Holiday.

programme.title: The Big Heat
programme.desc: An honest policeman is determined to bust police corruption and the stranglehold of the Mafia. At first he innocently begins investigating the Mafia-related killing of a fellow officer, but things turn nasty when his wife is killed in a car bomb blast meant for him, his child is threatened with kidnapping and he loses his job.

programme.title: Rashomon
programme.desc: A heavy downpour surprises a priest, a woodcutter and a servant. They seek protection from the water in a temple ruin. Previously, they witnessed a crime without knowing how the crime was committed.

programme.title: First Knight
programme.desc: Dissatisfied with King Arthur's rule of peace and freedom, Malagant, an erstwhile ally, turns against the Round Table and establishes a hostile domain. However, he goes too far when he kidnaps the queen and imprisons her in an appalling dungeon. The special skills of the glittering and impetuous swordsman Lancelot must be called upon to effect her rescue.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A disturbed undercover cop recovering from his wife's death is teamed up with a detective with a stable family background to crack an underground drug ring. The line between duty and off-duty begins to blur, however, when the daughter of one of the cops is kidnapped by the gun-toting heavies.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2
programme.desc: Psychotic LA cop Martin Riggs and his long-suffering partner Roger Murtaugh are assigned to guard an embezzling accountant due to testify before a federal commission. At first, they think it a routine piece of work, but they soon discover that their charge has been laundering money for the same South African narcotics syndicate they have been trying to crack.

programme.title: The Big Heat

programme.desc: Supernatural comedy about three New York parapsychology professors who decide to set up a ghost-catching agency. Soon a storm of malevolent spirits threatens to destroy the city, and the mysterious contents of a woman's fridge suggest a paranormal Armageddon.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: The phantom-fighters return to the streets of New York when they come to the aid of a woman who fears that her baby is the target of ghostly forces. Four years after Dr Peter Venkman broke up with Dana Barrett, she appeals for help to save her son when an arch-demon trapped in an oil painting wants to take over his body. The old team reunite and trace the source of the trouble to a sinister underground river of slime.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 3
programme.desc: Murtaugh is only days away from retirement when he and Riggs, along with officer Lorna Cole, are assigned to track down a crooked ex-cop who is supplying huge consignments of guns to gangs.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 4
programme.desc: Detective Riggs and Murtaugh are called into action to foil a Chinese crime lord who is selling immigrants into slavery on American soil. The pair aren't as young as they used to be, and ending up on a Triad hit list doesn't make things easy for them either.

programme.desc: Fresh from mounting a devastating bomb attack in London, an international terrorist arrives in New York and remains intent upon wreaking further bloody havoc. programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: The Front Room

programme.title: Man Finds Tape
programme.desc: When a series of strange video clips reveals a shocking murder, a brother and sister uncover a supernatural mystery that's overtaking their town.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: The Crazies
programme.desc: David Dutton is the sheriff of picture-perfect American town Ogden Marsh. One night and out of the blue one of its citizens shows up during a baseball game with a shot-gun and ready to kill. This is the beginning of a spiral of violence and mayhem.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Until Dawn
programme.desc: Exploring an abandoned visitor centre, Clover and her friends encounter a masked killer who murders them one by one. However, when they mysteriously wake up at the beginning of the same night, they're forced to relive the terror over and over again.

programme.title: Annabelle: Creation
programme.desc: Years after the tragic death of their daughter, a former toy maker and his wife welcome a nun and six orphaned girls into their farmhouse. Terror soon strikes when one child finds a seemingly innocent doll that appears to have a life of its own.

programme.title: Live Die Repeat: Edge of Tomorrow
programme.desc: A soldier who was killed in action gets caught up in a time loop, in which he repeatedly relives his last battle. However, the more times he fights, the closer he gets to discovering how to defeat the alien enemy.

programme.title: The Nun
programme.desc: When a young nun at a cloistered abbey in Romania takes her own life, a priest with a haunted past and a novice on the threshold of her final vows are sent by the Vatican to investigate. Together, they uncover the order's unholy secret. Risking not only their lives but their faith and their very souls, they confront a malevolent force in the form of a demonic nun.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Sinners

programme.title: Mickey 17

programme.title: Blade

A greedy cop discovers his true identity, and plans to hand him over to someone willing to pay, but things do not go to plan when female FBI agent Clarice Starling gets a call to help Lecter's only living victim - the hideously deformed Mason Verger.

programme.title: Ocean's 8
programme.desc: Criminal mastermind Debbie Ocean and seven other female thieves try to pull off the heist of the century at New York's annual Met Gala. Their target: a necklace that's worth more than $150 million.

programme.title: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: Believing he witnessed an abduction, a young man turns to his next-door neighbour, a retired security guard, to help him find the missing woman.

programme.title: Caddo Lake
programme.desc: When an 8-year-old girl mysteriously vanishes, a series of past deaths and disappearances start to link together, forever altering a broken family's history.

programme.title: Trap
programme.desc: A man and his teenage daughter realise they're at the centre of a dark and sinister event while watching a concert.

programme.title: Cellular
programme.desc: When teacher Jessica is kidnapped, the only call she can make on her mobile is to total stranger Ryan. It doesn't take long for Ryan to realise that only he can save Jessica - and her family - from the bad guys. She can't tell him her location, and his mobile battery won't last forever.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Former CIA assassin Jason Bourne continues his quest to fill in memory gaps. When a `Guardian' reporter stumbles onto his trail, Bourne spies his chance to blow the Blackbriar black-ops brigade wide open. With some very powerful people intent on keeping their skeletons buried, he is in more danger than ever before, as his former paymasters send a series of elite killers after their reformed ex-colleague.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Another great white shark arrives to terrorise the holiday resort of Amity Island. Having recovered from the grisly events of four years ago, the island is once again packed with tourists. Families are sailing in the bay and swimming off the beach, but when two divers and a water-skier go missing, the local police chief fears that he is about to relive his greatest nightmare.

programme.title: The Girl on the Train
programme.desc: A divorced train commuter passes the house she used to live in with her husband every day. To distract herself she creates a fictional perfect world for her former neighbours in her head. This is ruined when one of the neighbours goes missing.

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: Enhanced CIA assassin Aaron Cross faces a battle to survive when his CIA employers decide to do away with his programme.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A glamorous career woman loses control when her married lover, a Manhattan attorney, ends their brief affair. Unable to accept his rejection, she pursues him at the office, and then at his home, eventually drawing his wife and daughter into the confrontation.

programme.title: Vanilla Sky
programme.desc: A car crash leaves a playboy maimed and charged with murder in this remake of the mind-bending film `Abre los Ojos'.

programme.title: The Krays

The gangland empire they build is characterised by violence and intimidation, and the film is unflinching in its depiction of their rise to power.

programme.title: Hitmen: Reloaded
programme.desc: Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins star as Jamie and Fran, two misfits and best friends who always have each other's back. Together, the pair accidentally stumble into the world of murder and switch career paths to become professional assassins. Though their assignments constantly put their own lives at stake, the duo's endless bickering and inane antics mean they must carry out hits without being derailed by their own incompetence. Their friendship is put to the test when Fran questions whether this is the life she wants for herself.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.sub-title: Oh Dad, Poor Dad, He's Kept Me in the Closet and I'm So Sad
programme.desc: Will's father, George prepares to accept an award at a corporate dinner in his honour. However, George is reluctant to invite Will and Grace to the ceremony because he is ashamed of his son's homosexuality.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: When a scene in a sitcom is pulled because it features two gay men kissing, Will and Jack appear on The Today Show to protest about the channel's decision. Meanwhile, Karen gives Grace advice about dumping her oddball boyfriend.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace preaches the virtues of giving to charity and volunteers to help direct an amateur play at a community centre with Will. programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.sub-title: Hey La, Hey La, My Ex-Boyfriend's Back
programme.desc: Jack is concerned when Will's ex-boyfriend Michael returns to town intent on rekindling their relationship. Meanwhile, Karen decides to take a more active role in Grace Adler Designs.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: When Will is set up on a blind date by his boss, he in unsure whether or not to go. Of course, Jack is on hand with advice on how to be a good blind date.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: When Ellen and Rob announce their engagement, Grace tells Will that she once slept with the groom-to-be. Unfortunately, the secret surfaces at Ellen's bachelorette party and she decides to get her own back by attempting to seduce Will. Meanwhile, at Rob's bachelor party, Jack is confused when he becomes aroused by a lap dancer.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.sub-title: There, but for the Grace of Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace get a glimpse of their future selves when they visit their retired college professor, and discover that he is now a bitter old man with a `Grace' of his own. Meanwhile, Karen panics when Stan asks her to cook a meal for his birthday.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: After Karen's husband suffers a heart attack, there is speculation on whom she will turn to for support.

programme.desc: Grace finds out that one of Karen's friends is her competition for an important interior design job, and Jack convinces Will to help him in his latest venture.

programme.title: Will & Grace

programme.title: The Trip to Italy
programme.desc: Rob and Steve go on a boat trip run by local resident Lucy, who takes them to a local restaurant. They visit Percy Shelley's house for a picture before continuing their journey that eventually leads them to another restaurant.

programme.title: The Trip to Italy
programme.desc: Steve and Rob visit Viareggio in Tuscany where Shelley's body was washed ashore, and they have lunch at Trattoria Albana.

programme.title: The Trip to Italy
programme.desc: Rob and Steve arrive in Rome where they meet Steve's assistant Emma and the photographer Yolanda. Together they visit the Keats museum, and have lunch at Ristorante Oliver Glowig.

programme.title: The Trip to Italy
programme.desc: Steve and Rob visit Pompeii and then have lunch at Relais Blu on the Sorrento coast overlooking the isle of Capri.

programme.title: The Trip to Italy

programme.title: Maisie Adam: Appraisal
programme.desc: It's been a meteoric rise through the comedy ranks for Maisie Adam and she's fast on her way to becoming a household name. Stand-up is what she loves most and she's now five years into her job as a comedian, so perhaps she's due an appraisal.

programme.title: Leo Reich: Literally Who Cares?!

programme.desc: A tight-knit friend group gathers after years apart, navigating the complexities of ambition, relationships, and how time has changed them.

programme.title: I Love LA

programme.desc: Out of options and in a desperate attempt to prove himself and his company's worth to his pro mover dad, Everett Saunders, owner of Shazam Moving, enlists the help of anyone he can find for the day's high stakes moving job.

programme.sub-title: Not in Front of the Client

programme.title: Upright

programme.title: Upright

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Two men attacking a jewellers with an axe end up looking less like dangerous criminals and more like comedy characters. Also, after a series of muggings of elderly women in Norwich, the moment a victim buys a lottery ticket proves to be the key to the case.

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Con men pose as police officers to steal thousands of pounds from elderly victims, but the ringleader makes a crucial mistake. Also, a shoplifter dances like nobody is watching, but the security cameras are filming her every move.

programme.title: Send in the Dogs UK
programme.desc: The canine cops are back for a new series of eight episodes sniffing out drugs, guns, used bank notes or common or garden burglars. These English Spaniels and German Shepherds are more than a match for Britain's criminal community. Diesel the Cocker Spaniel and his handler PC Adele Gibson of the Met visit a suspected drug den. Meanwhile, car thieves are the target of Sgt Pete Madden and his German Shepherd Brodie.

programme.title: A1: Highway Patrol

programme.title: Dogtown and Z-Boys
programme.desc: In mid-70s America, skateboarding was a fad in danger of dying out, until a small group of surfers in Santa Monica began moving to extremes in both lifestyle and techniques, using their skills in empty swimming pools and the streets to create a new form of skateboarding. Director Stacy Peralta, who was one of the group, weaves home footage of their early days with interviews with those still in the scene.

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: The life story of the British film director, known both in the UK and across the pond for films such as `Ice Cold in Alex' and `Cape Fear'.

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of British actor Robert Shaw. Often cast in menacing roles, he is widely remembered for his performance as shark hunter Quint in Jaws.

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of Rex Harrison, the Oscar-winning English actor who starred as Professor Henry Higgins in the 1964 film musical My Fair Lady.

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: The life and career story of film director John Carpenter, known for his cult classics such as `Dark Star', `The Thing' and `Halloween'.

programme.title: Enigma
programme.desc: An exploration of transgender identity and legacy through the stories of icons April Ashley and Amanda Lear.

programme.title: History of the Sitcom
programme.desc: Moms, dads, husbands, wives, brothers, sisters -- more than just a hilarious reflection of people to grow up and old with, sitcoms have opened the hearts of many to a more inclusive vision of what family can mean.

programme.title: History of the Sitcom
programme.desc: Work families can be even funnier than biological ones, since the endless array of wacky sitcom characters on the job offers hilarious insights into the state of the American workplace.

programme.title: History of the Sitcom
programme.desc: When Americans look beyond family or work for their identity, the "hanging out with friends" sitcom redefines the genre and reveals television's challenging quest for inclusivity and authentic representation.

programme.title: History of the Sitcom
programme.desc: In many homes, difficult conversations about race and diversity have first happened on the sitcom screen, helping pave the way for progress with hilarity and laughter.

programme.title: I Am Richard Pryor
programme.desc: Richard Pryor drew the line between comedy and tragedy as thin as possible, volatile yet vulnerable, crass but sensitive, streetwise and cocky, Pryor did not simply tell stories, he brought them to vivid life.

programme.title: My Icon
programme.desc: Sports stars discuss the individuals that have inspired them.

programme.title: Hitsville: The Making of Motown
programme.desc: A look at the birth of Motown in Detroit in 1958 until its relocation to Los Angeles in the early 1970s. Featuring rare performances, interviews and behind-the-scenes footage offer insight into the history and cultural impact of Motown Records.

programme.title: How The Beatles Changed the World
programme.desc: The fascinating story of the cultural, social, spiritual and musical revolution ignited by the Beatles.

programme.title: I Am Johnny Cash
programme.desc: A celebration of the larger-than-life and somewhat rebellious performer from the unique perspective of the so-called Man in Black's greatest songs.

programme.title: Mr. Dynamite: The Rise of James Brown
programme.desc: Rare footage, interviews and photographs chronicle the musical ascension of the performer.

programme.title: Music Box: Counting Crows: Have You Seen Me Lately?
programme.desc: After their debut album's success, Counting Crows and singer Adam Duritz became global rockstars; interviews and 90s footage show how they navigated sudden fame while staying true to their art.

programme.title: Searching for Sugar Man
programme.desc: Though he faded into obscurity in the US, an early '70s musician known as Rodriguez became a huge hit in South Africa and was widely rumoured to have died. Two obsessed fans set out to learn the man's true fate.

programme.title: Cracking the Code
programme.sub-title: The Code That Won the Great War
programme.desc: Uncover some of the world's most renowned encryptions, revealing how they were decoded, the minds who cracked them and the secrets they masked.

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers
programme.desc: When convoy ONS.5 enters the most perilous part of its journey, an area of the Atlantic that could not be reached by conventional air cover, Dönitz unleashes his wolf-packs.

programme.title: Digging Up Britain's Past
programme.desc: In 1592, Elizabeth visited magnificent Sudeley Castle for a three-day party to end all parties, which included the creation of a spectacular garden. 500 hundred years later, a team of archaeologists hunt for this lost gem.

programme.title: Digging Up Britain's Past
programme.desc: Archaeology series exploring fascinating periods in British history as revealed by unfolding archaeological digs.

programme.title: Britain's Secret Islands
programme.desc: A trip through England's south coast, diving with blue sharks, exploring the battlements of Drake's Island, learning the origins of Scouts, and checking out fossils on the Isle of Wight.

programme.desc: Tori investigates the remains of children and teenagers found in the car park of the Victoria Gate shopping centre in Leeds.

programme.title: Alien Corridors

programme.desc: Deep in the South Caribbean Sea, explore the protected waters of Bonaire National Marine Park, home to thriving reefs, endangered sea turtles, sprawling mangroves, and a plethora of marine life.

programme.title: Ocean Parks
programme.desc: Deep in the south Caribbean Sea we explore the protected waters of the Bonaire National Marine Park, home to thriving reefs, endangered sea turtles, sprawling mangroves and a plethora of marine life.

programme.title: Cub Camp
programme.desc: Bone up on outdoor skills as Winston and the X girls move into their new fresh-air enclosure, and witness Yasmine and Yara's kindergarten power struggle. Then look over restless yearling Victor, whose sudden limp pushes back his release date.

programme.title: Cub Camp
programme.desc: Experience the joys of rain and climbing with Yasmine and Yara, and watch Winston take a dip in his new pool. Go hunting for dropped radio collars with Roger and Steve, then see what happens when the two groups of summer cubs come face-to-face.

programme.title: City Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: The medical team check on a turkey vulture with an injured shoulder. However, the team has a hard time getting him into the X-ray.

programme.title: City Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: A mother rabbit is brought into the Wildlife Centre with a baby, but the baby is not hers. The team is worried that the baby might be in danger if they leave it in her crate. Baby squirrels appear en masse as fall begins.

programme.title: City Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: A group of orphaned squirrel babies storm the Wildlife Centre. The vets take care of a young wounded vulture that may be kept in the observation all winter. The team tries to catch a rogue coyote.

programme.title: City Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: Nathalie searches for a new home for the centre, while the team cares for a turkey vulture.

programme.title: Into the Wild India
programme.desc: One of the most iconic animals on Earth stalks the jungles of India: the Bengal Tiger. Over the course of a single day, we follow the fortunes of one mother and her three young cubs. She must provide enough food for her family to stay alive.

programme.title: Into the Wild India
programme.desc: A young lion cub must survive as his family is torn apart and two adolescent leopard cubs must fend for themselves after they are abandoned. Plus, a young adult blackbuck must risk life and limb as he tries to secure his first mating.

programme.title: Land of Gremlins
programme.desc: A family of lemurs in the rainforest of Mantadia National Park.

programme.title: Land of Gremlins
programme.desc: A look at how Madagascar's species have evolved to exploit their various habitats.

programme.title: Land of Gremlins
programme.desc: A look at the cold-blooded residents of Madagascar.

programme.title: Predators
programme.desc: Welcome to the shores Canada's Hudson Bay, where a unique community polar bears are battling to survive in a rapidly changing landscape.

programme.title: Predators
programme.desc: Journey to the harsh Okavango Delta as the Matata Pride do battle with wildfires and flooding in a high-stakes fight to keep their cubs alive.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: In the beachside suburbs of the Sunshine Coast, it's not just snakes that have residents on alert. While Dan tries to rescue the larger lizard from the roof, Jess chases another that has escaped up a high tree, next to an active beehive! Stu visits a farm with an eastern brown snake trapped in a fence and Liv and Stu protect a dog from a roaming red belly black snake. Meanwhile, Mick plays a prickly game of hide and seek with a stubborn coastal carpet python.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Follows a group of professional snake catchers on Queensland's Sunshine Coast as they go head-to-head with some of the planet's deadliest snakes.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Rise of Animals: Triumph of the Vertebrates
programme.sub-title: From the Seas to the Skies
programme.desc: David Attenborough uses fossil evidence and CGI to reveal the story of the vertebrates, from their humble origins as the primitive fish that once swam in ancient seas, to their radical move onto land and beyond.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Rise of Animals: Triumph of the Vertebrates
programme.desc: David Attenborough uses fossil evidence and CGI to reveal how mammals developed from tiny forest dwellers to become the dominant life form on the planet.

programme.title: Alaskan Summer
programme.desc: The effects of summer weather on Alaskan wildlife.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: In the beachside suburbs of the Sunshine Coast, it's not just snakes that have residents on alert. While Dan tries to rescue the larger lizard from the roof, Jess chases another that has escaped up a high tree, next to an active beehive! Stu visits a farm with an eastern brown snake trapped in a fence and Liv and Stu protect a dog from a roaming red belly black snake. Meanwhile, Mick plays a prickly game of hide and seek with a stubborn coastal carpet python.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Follows a group of professional snake catchers on Queensland's Sunshine Coast as they go head-to-head with some of the planet's deadliest snakes.

programme.title: Impossible Animals
programme.desc: Biologist Patrick Aryee introduces us to the incredible animals living in one of the world's toughest places, deserts.

programme.title: Impossible Animals
programme.desc: Patrick Ayree examines the rainforest residents that have pushed their bodies to the limit, revealing some of the world's most remarkable behaviours and adaptations.

programme.title: Impossible Animals
programme.desc: Patrick Aryee examines the animals that live on the coast. From crashing waves to extreme tides, surviving here takes ingenuity and incredible adaptations.

programme.title: Kingdom Of The Tides
programme.desc: From the untamed Pacific to the wild Bay of Fundy, Cullis-Suzuki embarks on a coast-to-coast adventure to discover the survival secrets of those that inhabit Canada's intertidal zones.

programme.title: Wild Rockies
programme.desc: Some of the mightiest rivers in North America originate on the glacial heights of the Rocky Mountains. The lakes, rivers and marshes of the Rockies are like arteries pulsing through the landscape, feeding the creatures that call the mountains home.

programme.title: Wild Rockies
programme.desc: Survival in the forest means maintaining a delicate balance between growth and destruction and death and rebirth, a forest should be in a constant state of regeneration. When trees get too tall they block all the sunlight from hitting the ground, which means grasses and smaller shrubs can't grow, diminishing habitat for animals like elk, moose, caribou, and wolves.

programme.title: The Invisible River- Under Water Between The Black Forest And The Vosges
Great Parks of Africa
programme.desc: Table Mountain National Park on the southwestern tip of Africa surrounded by ocean and humanity. It is a rugged peninsula jutting out into the cold Atlantic Ocean and forming an island of incredible diversity.

programme.title: Nature's Dress Code: Who Wears What And Why
Weird, Wild & Wonderful
programme.desc: Trek across Africa for a peek at the colourful, quirky survival strategies of its animals. See these furry, feathered, and scaled magicians, from flamboyant flamingos to vanishing lizards, find food, elude predators, and find mates against all odds.

programme.title: Ocean's Greatest Feast
programme.desc: Get a front-row seat to the planet's biggest biomass migration, as billions of sardines migrate along South Africa's east coast, each hoping to escape the jaws of hungry predators.

programme.title: Shark With Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve explores the radical variety of sharks in the Atlantic Ocean and marks the start of a global journey in the so-called shark capital of the world, the Bahamas.

programme.title: Shark With Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Take a look behind the scenes as naturalist and shark-lover Steve Backshall gets up close and personal with these amazing creatures.

programme.title: Shark: British Isles Special with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve explores a world of sharks right on your doorstep. Meet everything from Basking sharks to Angelsharks which have never been filmed before, and discover the threats these sharks face.

programme.title: Wild Animal Babies
programme.desc: Patrick Aryee looks at how single offspring depend on one critical life companion - their mother, who will go to extraordinary lengths to care for them.

programme.title: Wild Animal Babies
programme.desc: Exploring how some siblings quickly forge lifelong bonds, while others compete.

programme.title: Wild Animal Babies
programme.desc: For animals born in bulk, life is a battle from the very start. Patrick marvels at the many strategies nature has come up with to raise the next generation.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Elephant
programme.desc: David Attenborough investigates the life story of Jumbo the elephant, the celebrity animal superstar who is said to have inspired the movie `Dumbo'. Attenborough joins a team of scientists and conservationists to unravel the story of Jumbo.

programme.title: Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: David begins his journey inside the magnificent Palm House, a unique global rainforest in London.

programme.title: Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: David Attenborough explores the secret life of plants at Kew, examining everything from a huge underground specimen to a snappy carnivorous variety.

programme.title: Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: David Attenborough concludes his absorbing journey around London's Kew Gardens, as he discovers how some plants have evolved to shed their dependency on water enabling them to survive in the driest environments.

programme.desc: In Australia, meet the world's most venomous snake. Plus, in nearby oceans, discover the deadly nature the marine creatures that share these tropical waters.

programme.title: Pratigyabadh
programme.desc: After her husband travels to Bombay to try to make some money in order to pay back a loan to local money-lender Lala Sukhilal, Laxmi is left lonely and apprehensive with her three children. When they fail to hear from him for months Sukhilal offers to help as long as Laxmi becomes intimate with him, but when she refuses he decides to repossess their home and belongings as repayment for the loan.

programme.title: Anand Ashram
programme.desc: Dr Deepak lives with his wealthy father, a Thakur, in a small town in India. While the Thakur would like to get Deepak to marry a woman from an equally wealthy family, he has fallen in love with a poor woman named Asha.

programme.title: Conversation with Poonam Dhillion
programme.desc: Poonam Dhillon is a multi-award winning artist and silver screen icon and has acted in over 100 films. Poonam will give the audience an insight about her struggles, stardom, motherhood and success.

programme.title: Amar Prem
programme.desc: Nandu returns to the village where he grew up, looking for his childhood love Pushpa. However, Pushpa's reputation has been forever tarnished.

programme.title: Dil Tujhko Diya
programme.desc: A story of a mother and her child who attempt to gain back the status that was taken away from them.

programme.title: Ek Chalis Ki Last Local
programme.desc: Two people miss the last local train, at 1:40 a.m., changing their lives forever.

programme.title: Namak Haram
programme.desc: Two young men from very different backgrounds, one from a shanty house in a Delhi slum, the other from a very wealthy Calcutta family, forge a friendship which is then put to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Yahaan
programme.desc: In the disputed territory of Kashmir a young Muslim woman meets and falls in love with a Hindu man and, in their love and desire for marriage, commit the greatest sin according to those wrapped up in the Kashmiri conflict.

programme.title: Bundal Baaz
programme.desc: The poor Rajaram pretends to be wealthy in order to get married to his sweetheart, much to the displeasure of her father. After obtaining a degree in Arts, he attempts to find work but is beaten-up when he is found slacking. Rajaram returns to Bombay and one day comes across a bottle containing a 20000 year old genie with magical powers. The genie insists on helping him for one year.

programme.title: Meri Adalat
programme.desc: A tough cop takes the law into his own hands to take revenge on the killers of his sister and her lover.

programme.title: Meri Adalat
programme.desc: A tough cop takes the law into his own hands to take revenge on the killers of his sister and her lover.

programme.title: The Starlost
programme.desc: Oro returns, offering to repair the Ark's faulty systems and fly them all to settle on Exar, which he claims is much like Earth; Devon discovers he's lying, but can only prove it in a debate in which the loser will be killed.

programme.title: The Green Hornet Strikes Again!
programme.desc: The crime syndicate's plans to sell the anti-aircraft bomb are in tatters. Needing money fast, Crogan turns to getting his hands on Ms Grayson's fortune.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sir Lancelot
programme.desc: Two sisters are left a small kingdom by their father, but the older girl is being set up to marry by her guardian.

programme.title: Honey West
programme.desc: Honey goes after a master thief who stole an actress's jewellery while she was being interviewed on TV.

programme.title: Front Line Kids
programme.desc: A gang of street urchins are given jobs by a Head Porter to help his crooked plans succeed.

programme.title: Miss Robin Hood
programme.desc: Henry is a mild man who writes adventure stories for his girls. All is fine until he meets miss Honey.

programme.title: Lord Jim
programme.desc: Powerful tale of cowardice and redemption, based on Joseph Conrad's classic novel. During a hurricane, a seaman abandons his ship and its passengers to save himself. Many die horribly, and the sailor knows that he will always be branded a coward. Much later, when he takes on a job transporting dynamite upriver to a tribe rebelling against oppression, he hopes that the perilous task will lead to spiritual regeneration.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts' new exclusive dress shop becomes "The House of Granny" -- complete with cracker barrel, potbellied stove, etc.

programme.title: The Railway Children
programme.desc: Set in Yorkshire at the dawn of the 20th century, this is the story of three children whose father has been wrongfully imprisoned for espionage, though they know nothing of this; their mother refuses to tell them why the police took away their father. So, the children spend their free time exploring the mystery of their father's disappearance and gazing at the nearby railroad in the hope that it will somehow bring them an answer.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: On the eve of the Bruce Wayne Handicap, Penguin plans to enter Lola Lasagne's glue factory horse, Parasol, as a long shot and win a fortune.

programme.title: The Adventures of Robin Hood
programme.desc: Friar Tuck meets Robin Hood for the first time while enlisting his aid to protect a young maiden from a forced marriage.

programme.title: What's on TPTV with Noel
programme.desc: Founder of Talking Pictures TV and one half of the Footage Detectives, Noel Cronin, shares shows and films not to be missed throughout the end of May and beginning of June.

programme.title: The Man From U.N.C.L.E.
programme.desc: Solo, Kuryakin and Waverly turn a plain music student into a glamorous Parisian performer to trap a ring of diamond thieves.

programme.title: The Footage Detectives
programme.desc: This week there's a 'grate' reel on the Great British tradition of cheese rolling, a very famous Ronnie has a word with the usherettes & a short film on a 60s 'boy band'.

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: An intimate portrait of Austrian-born filmmaker Fritz Lang, one of the most accomplished and enduring directors of the 20th century.

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Angie falls for the idea of having children, but Robert isn't as excited about the idea.

programme.title: The Vise
programme.desc: A real estate agent Ronald Briggs falls in love with Sylvia. When Sylvia visits Ronnie's wife, she is found dead.

programme.title: Sergeant Cork
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Dutiful Murderer
programme.desc: The Case of the Dutiful Murderer. 1964. Stars John Barrie, William Gaunt & Charles Morgan. Cork criticises a friend of different culture. After the pair clash his friend's daughter is found dead.

programme.title: Up in the World
programme.desc: A window cleaner on a country estate suffers the pranks of his employer's son, only to get the blame when there is an attempt to kidnap the aristocratic young upstart.

programme.title: The Heritage Chart Show
programme.desc: A TOTP style TV Show for Heritage Artists based on the Heritage Chart which is voted on in over 80 countries. Songs you love from popular artists, live and on video with the odd interview.

programme.title: Confessions of a Pop Performer
programme.desc: A performer with a multitude of solid-gold hits displays more than musical talent.

programme.title: Rentadick
programme.desc: The incompetent detectives of Rentadick, Inc. track thieves of an experimental nerve gas that paralyses from the waist down.

programme.title: The Rogues
programme.desc: To fund a forger's retirement, Marcel and Timmy plan to switch a fake Rembrandt for an original, then resell the original.

programme.title: Great Raids of World War II
programme.desc: On 26 March 1942, the destroyer HMS Campbeltown, packed with commandos and explosives, set out on a daring mission to destroy Germany's giant battleship, the Tirptiz. If it could be put out of action the chances of Nazi raiders threatening Britain's coastline would greatly diminish.

programme.title: Nazi Quest for the Holy Grail
programme.desc: The hunt to discover the lost Aryan civilisation from which the Nazis believed they had descended. Heinrich Himmler helped to launch an array of pseudo-scientific expeditions to find evidence of the mythical Aryan `master race'.

programme.title: Jungle War
programme.desc: Konfrontasi, a conflict between Indonesia and Malaysia that centres on fighting in the jungles of Borneo.

programme.title: Trains at War
programme.desc: Trains were at the heart of the D-Day landing strategy and the liberation of Europe, starting with strategic bombings that aimed to paralyse the entire French rail system.

programme.title: Upstairs, Downstairs
programme.desc: James and Hazel attend a fox-hunting weekend at a large country house, where Hazel is persuaded to take part in a practical joke. When it backfires, however, she exposes James to ridicule, herself to personal danger, and their marriage to a serious crisis.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon amazes the others when it turns out that she has a high IQ, and Dorien, under pressure to find a heroine for her next book, decides to push her towards a surprising career. programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Essex-based sitcom about sisters Tracey and Sharon and their larger-than-life friend Dorien. Meanwhile, Tracey finds motherhood is not all that it's cracked up to be.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.sub-title: The Girls with the Pearl Buttons
programme.desc: When Tracey is nominated by Auntie Vera to succeed her as Pearly Queen of Thornton Heath and Sharon finds out, the gloves are off and it is war. Things are not much better when Dorien reluctantly agrees to a family reunion with Naomi.

programme.desc: During Darryl's funeral, Tracey's house is burgled. The family decide it is up to them to track down their possessions and set out on a trail involving a snooker club, a pawnbroker and the infamous Theydon Boys drag club.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon's disapproval of Tracey dating policeman Barry and apparently overlooking Garth's feelings for his dad leads to a major quarrel between the sisters. Can Dorien - in her new role as agony aunt for Get-a-Life Magazine - help solve the dispute?

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey has had enough of Dorien and Sharon. She is annoyed by the way Dorien continues entertaining her gentlemen callers and is irritated by the fact that Sharon is not bringing in a living wage - so she throws them both out. Holed up back in Sharon's old bedsit, the two of them decide to join forces and take a united stand - but can they?

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.sub-title: Tonight I'll Be Staying Here with You
programme.desc: Auntie Vera has got problems with her hips and her defective lifts and tells Sharon and Tracey she is moving in. There is only got one room available though, and a dismayed Dorien is told that family must come first.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: A surprise visitor in the form of attractive Emma turns up at Tracey's house. Tracey is welcoming, Dorien is shocked to the core, and Travis is over the moon.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Travis has serious school news that he is scared to break to his mum. Sharon decides that she can pass herself off as Tracey and sort out his problems - but her efforts land the family in a mess that only arch-seducer Dorien can get them out of.

programme.title: Steptoe and Son
programme.desc: Albert and Harold are both preparing for Christmas, but Harold's plans do not include his father. In fact, he is determined to get as far away from him as possible and has plane tickets for Majorca.

programme.title: Steptoe and Son
programme.desc: Albert and Harold plan a Christmas abroad, but when Albert discovers he needs a passport, things start to get complicated. Why can't they go to Bognor?

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: A scheming builder arranges for a group of heavies to intimidate a car dealer into selling his land.

programme.title: Benidorm
programme.desc: A miserable Mateo reveals that his home life is a disaster and confides in Lesley that his mother-in-law Dolores is threatening to kill him. Clive, Tiger and Terri come up with a plan to get Clive's 5,000 euros back from Monty the property developer who swindled him.

programme.title: Shameless
programme.desc: Consumed with guilt after the hit and run, Shane tries to makes amends by befriending Ruth, the widow of the man he killed. Blind to his identity, Ruth welcomes Shane into her life, but her troubled teenage son Shaun hates this interfering stranger.
